waves.point_eqs_str: a['n']=(a['sample']*6.283); a['flip']=(a['flip']+1); a['flip']=(a['flip']*below(a['flip'], 2)); a['phase']=((((Math.sin((a['n']*3))*Math.sin((a['n']*7.9)))*Math.sin((a['n']*16.7)))*Math.sin((a['n']*63.5)))*6); a['xp']=(Math.sin((a['n']+a['phase']))*a['flip']); a['yp']=(Math.cos((a['n']+a['phase']))*a['flip']); a['zp']=0; a['ang']=((a['n']*2)+(a['phase']*0.2)); a['xq']=((a['xp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['yq']=a['yp']; a['zq']=((a['xp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['ang']=(a['time']*0.1); a['xp']=((a['xq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=((a['xq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['ang']=(a['time']*0.17); a['xq']=a['xp']; a['yq']=((a['yp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['zq']=((a['yp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['zq']=(a['zq']+3.1); a['xs']=div(a['xq'],a['zq']); a['ys']=div(a['yq'],a['zq']); a['x']=(a['xs']+0.5); a['y']=((a['ys']*1.3)+0.5); a['a']=((1-a['flip'])*0.05);
